visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A close-up view of a person's hands with blue-grey manicured nails using a circular metal cutter to punch holes into a flat, round dough piece filled with green scallions on a plastic-covered surface under bright, even indoor lighting. (2) Instant noodles are lifted from a pot of boiling water using wooden chopsticks, followed by a shot of seasoning being sprinkled from a silver packet onto the cooked noodles in a bowl with a printed graphic of a person. (3) The green onion dough is fried in a black pan; two yellow egg yolks are carefully placed into the eye holes, and a cooked sausage is added to the mouth hole to create a face. (4) A woman in a black top and white skirt slides the finished face-shaped pancake with noodle hair and ketchup blush from the pan onto a patterned plate in a modern kitchen setting with clean white countertops. (5) A man wearing a black t-shirt and patterned shorts holds the plate and uses chopsticks to taste the creation while the woman stands beside him in a spacious living room with warm, bright lighting and minimalist furniture.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 開天眼. (2) [Variety]: 戳鼻孔. (3) [Variety]: 挖嘴巴. (4) [Variety]: 煮麵. (5) [Variety]: 加點調味. (6) [Variety]: 上油. (7) [Variety]: 開煎. (8) [Variety]: 記得翻面. (9) [Variety]: 只要蛋黃. (10) [Variety]: 來個香腸嘴. (11) [Variety]: 不想禿頭. (12) [Variety]: 小眼睛. (13) [Variety]: 來點口紅. (14) [Variety]: 盛盤上菜. (15) [Subtitle]: 今天的晚餐很不錯. (16) [Subtitle]: 跟你很像. (17) [Subtitle]: 我覺得蠻好吃的. (18) [Subtitle]: 麵我還有調味. (19) [Subtitle]: 我怕那個單吃麵沒味道. (20) [Subtitle]: 蠻好吃的啊. (21) [Subtitle]: 加沾醬. (22) [Subtitle]: 吃吃看. (23) [Subtitle]: 沾那個蛋. (24) [Subtitle]: 香腸 小香腸. (25) [Subtitle]: 腮紅. (26) [Subtitle]: 沾一下腮紅. (27) [Subtitle]: 可以啊. (28) [Subtitle]: 那個餅也不錯. (29) [Subtitle]: 可以賣欸. (30) [Slogan]: 蔡媽媽泡麵煎餅. (31) [Slogan]: 底下留言許願.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator preparing food, 1 male friend/partner tasting the food.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long black hair wearing a black tank top and white skirt; a man with brown hair wearing a black t-shirt and colorful patterned shorts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern residential interior featuring a clean kitchen with a stovetop and white counters, and a living area with a large sofa, minimalist decor, and warm recessed lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo pop track with a synthesized beat and strong percussion begins. The sharp, metallic clink of a cutter striking a surface is clearly audible against the music. No human speech is present in this introductory phase. (2) The sound of bubbling water and the gentle slosh of noodles being lifted are heard. This is followed by the distinct rustle of a foil packet being opened and the soft patter of seasoning granules hitting the noodles. (3) Loud, continuous sizzling and popping sounds of frying oil fill the acoustic space. A sharp crack of an eggshell followed by the wet plop of a yolk is heard. The BGM maintains a steady, driving rhythm throughout. (4) A female voice with high pitch and energetic tone speaks briefly. The sound of a plastic bottle being squeezed produces a short, airy puff noise. Slurping sounds of eating begin to emerge over the constant background music. (5) A male voice with a calm, friendly tone and moderate pitch engages in dialogue with the female. Their speech is interspersed with the rhythmic clack of wooden chopsticks against a ceramic plate and occasional laughter and chewing sounds.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a creative and humorous cooking project where standard ingredients like instant noodles and eggs are transformed into a 'face' pancake, ending with a positive taste test by a friend.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses fast-paced editing and bright text overlays typical of modern short-form social media content to maintain high viewer engagement.
